title: Which statement is true about Agile and DevOps?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which statement is true about Agile and DevOps?


Agile and DevOps are important technologies that bring enormous value to our clients.


Agile and DevOps both focus on reducing challenges and continuously delivering high value to the customer.


Agile and DevOps are ways of implementing technology only in the software development world.


Agile focuses on delivering customer value, while DevOps focuses on testing.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Agile and DevOps both focus on reducing challenges and continuously delivering high value to the customer.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
A major hospital uses an Agile approach to manage surgery schedules. A large board set up in a common office allows staff to quickly identify which procedures are scheduled, the times they are scheduled, and who is involved.

Which method is described in this scenario?


Journey Mapping


Kanban


Waterfall


Sprint

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
What is a downside of using the traditional Waterfall approach?


It prevents the development team from quantifying the effort, time, and cost of delivering the final product.


It can increase costs and delays if updates are incorporated in the development process after the planning stage.


It lacks detailed documentation, leading to misunderstandings and difficulties between the team members.


It requires a larger commitment for collaboration between project team members than Agile.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: It can increase costs and delays if updates are incorporated in the development process after the planning stage.
